intro.bio:
Couple decades behind the turntables. Scratching with rap groups and DJs of all kinds, mixing all sorts of styles in trendy bars, fashionable buvettes and at special events across Quebec.

I've also been DJ Muhammad Alias and DJ Alias in the past.
next-events.heading: Next Events
reviews.heading: Reviews
reviews.simone.text: Groove placed at just the right moments thanks to his keen ear for the atmosphere. Always on the lookout to share little musical gems with us.
reviews.tmo.text: A great guy, with a unique sense of humour, and a formidable DJ, capable of being technically skilled, but also of animating the crowd and making the right musical choices.
reviews.jessie.text: We hired him for our opening at Le Birdie and he delivered top-notch. Perfect atmosphere, great personality. A true pro!
demos.le-bon-groove.title: Le Bon Groove
demos.le-bon-groove.desc: Head nodding on the couch and dancing a bit when getting up to go to the fridge.
demos.jazzy-house.title: Jazzy House
demos.jazzy-house.desc: Snippet from a two-hour Twitch 5@7 stream held every Friday. March 15th 2023.
demos.chill.title: 1,2,3 Chill
demos.chill.desc: 3 songs just to chill out. Great fit for the lounge, the buvette or even the bath.
timeline.la-constellation.desc: Touring across Quebec with this popular rap group signed to a major record label.
timeline.ast-du-son.desc: DJ and host collaborating on the radio show specializing in French-language rap featuring Quebec and French rap.
timeline.taktika.desc: Touring DJ with one of the pioneering Quebec rap groups across the Canadian Francophonie who has collaborated with the entire hip-hop community.
timeline.83.desc: Studio recorded scratches and live shows with the iconic band from the Explicit Productions label.
timeline.focus.desc: Took a lot of time out of the dj business but still did it for fun at the house and at friends'. Some show with Taktika too.
timeline.twitch.desc: Weekly Friday happy hour streamer. Raid train and all.
timeline.demain.desc: Host and DJ of a hip-hop radio show at CJMD.
timeline.les-yeux-bleus.desc: Série "Le get down" et sets de terrasse roots reggae.
timeline.quebec-kebs.desc: DJ for the ABA professional basketball team.
timeline.source.desc: Host and DJ of a mixed weekly hip-hop radio show.
timeline.red-bull.desc: Event DJ for extreme sports activities sponsored by the company.
timeline.pagail.desc: Studio recorded scratches on the one and only album "C'est pour les miens".
